headline: Is It Too Late To Reassess Nucor (NUE) After Its 106% One Year Surge?
summary: Investors may be wondering if Nucor at around US$234 per share still offers value, or if most of the easy gains are already behind it. The stock has posted returns of 5.3% over 7 days, 38.1% over 30 days, 38.3% year to date, and 106.5% over 1 year. This naturally raises questions about what is already priced in and how much risk you are now taking on. Recent coverage of Nucor has focused on its position within the broader metals and materials sector and how investors are reacting to that...

headline: Nucor (NUE) Gains Fresh Bullish Call as Seaport Research Lifts Target to $245
summary: Nucor Corporation (NYSE:NUE) is included among the 10 Best Value Stocks to Buy in 2026 According to Warren Buffett. On May 1, Seaport Research raised its price recommendation on Nucor Corporation (NYSE:NUE) to $245 from $185. It reiterated a Buy rating on the stock. The firm said it remains encouraged by Nucor’s long-term growth potential across […]
